candidate_findings.claim: In Scene A, Rawn appears to commit to visiting the warden before the morning session. In Scene B, no visit is referenced; instead, a changed schedule is mentioned.

evidence_spans.span_text: Rawn told her he would go to the warden himself before the morning session.
His expression told her the meeting had not happened. He said the warden had sent word at first light that the schedule had changed.

candidate_findings.uncertainty_note: The commitment may be bypassed intentionally due to unforeseen circumstances explained later in the narrative.
candidate_findings.review_note: Verify if subsequent scenes clarify why Rawn did not visit the warden and how this affects the plot.

overall_run_note: Scene B appears to bypass a named commitment from Scene A regarding a meeting with the warden, raising a progression break concern.
